---

## 🧠 CORE STRUCTURE

At the center of MYTHOS is a recursive parsing system called **SYMNUM4GRAM**, a symbolic grammar that breaks text into three cascading levels of structure: sentence, word, and letter. Each element becomes modular, symbolic, and reconfigurable. This allows the system to perform operations on meaning the way a modular synth processes sound: with rerouting, looping, blending, filtering, and layering. All symbols—whether linguistic, emotional, historical, or imagined—can be split, tagged, remixed, and reassembled.

Wrapped around this is the **Recursive Generative Language Engine (RGLE)**, the living heart of the system. Unlike static AI models, RGLE is designed to mutate, to reflect, and to grow in dialogue with its user. It is memory-aware, identity-sensitive, and philosophically recursive. It references back not just to prior outputs, but to prior emotional states, symbolic threads, and mythic positions held by the user within the system.
